# Stack-chan v1 CAD Assets

Source: <https://github.com/stack-chan/stack-chan>

Imported files:

- `shell.stl`, `shell.step`
- `feet_top.stl`, `feet_top.step`
- `feet_bottom.stl`, `feet_bottom.step`
- `horn.stl`, `horn.step`
- `bracket_XL330_f.stl`, `bracket_XL330_f.step`
- `bracket_XL330_b.stl`, `bracket_XL330_b.step`
- `gear_XL330.stl`, `gear_XL330.step`
- `gear_XL330_narrow.stl`, `gear_XL330_narrow.step`
- `dynamixel_ja.md`

License: Apache-2.0. See `LICENSE` in this directory.

The Nikechan RoverC build currently uses the Stack-chan shell as the CoreS3
character exterior and replaces the original servo body with a RoverC Pro
pedestal adapter.
